_meta.description: Symptom-to-FM mapping catalog for OCP phosphate processing equipment

symptoms.description: Excessive vibration from rotating component
symptoms.description_fr: Vibration excessive du composant rotatif
symptoms.primary_cbm: Vibration spectrum analysis
symptoms.threshold: >7.1 mm/s velocity at bearing housing

symptoms.description: Bearing vibration increasing trend
symptoms.description_fr: Tendance croissante de vibration des roulements
symptoms.primary_cbm: Vibration envelope analysis on bearing frequencies
symptoms.threshold: >4.5 mm/s RMS at bearing cap, or spike energy >0.5 gSE

symptoms.description: Loose bolts or coupling misalignment detected via vibration
symptoms.description_fr: Boulons desserrés ou désalignement de l’accouplement détecté par vibration
symptoms.primary_cbm: Vibration phase analysis and laser alignment
symptoms.threshold: 2x or 3x running speed amplitude >50% of 1x component

symptoms.description: Abnormal grinding or scraping noise from equipment
symptoms.description_fr: Bruit anormal de grincement ou de raclage de l’équipement
symptoms.primary_cbm: Acoustic emission monitoring
symptoms.threshold: >85 dB at 1 m from source, or audible change from baseline

symptoms.description: High-pitched whining or screeching from bearings
symptoms.description_fr: Grincement aigu ou crissement des roulements
symptoms.primary_cbm: Ultrasonic emission detection at bearing housing
symptoms.threshold: >10 dB above baseline ultrasound reading

symptoms.description: Elevated bearing or motor temperature
symptoms.description_fr: Température élevée des roulements ou du moteur
symptoms.primary_cbm: Continuous temperature monitoring via RTD/thermocouple
symptoms.threshold: >95 °C bearing temperature or >40 °C above ambient

symptoms.description: Motor winding overtemperature alarm
symptoms.description_fr: Alarme de surtempérature des enroulements du moteur
symptoms.primary_cbm: Winding temperature monitoring and current analysis
symptoms.threshold: >Class F insulation limit (155 °C) or current >110% FLA

symptoms.description: Oil or grease leak from seal or housing
symptoms.description_fr: Fuite d’huile ou de graisse au niveau du joint ou du carter
symptoms.primary_cbm: Visual inspection and seal leak rate measurement
symptoms.threshold: >5 drops/min or visible pooling beneath equipment

symptoms.description: Process slurry or chemical leak from piping or pump
symptoms.description_fr: Fuite de boue ou de produit chimique de la tuyauterie ou de la pompe
symptoms.primary_cbm: Visual inspection and ultrasonic wall thickness measurement
symptoms.threshold: Any visible process fluid external to containment

symptoms.description: Abnormal pressure reading in hydraulic or pneumatic system
symptoms.description_fr: Lecture de pression anormale dans le système hydraulique ou pneumatique
symptoms.primary_cbm: Continuous pressure transmitter monitoring
symptoms.threshold: >15% deviation from normal operating pressure

symptoms.description: Reduced flow rate or pump discharge pressure drop
symptoms.description_fr: Débit réduit ou chute de pression de refoulement de la pompe
symptoms.primary_cbm: Flow meter and discharge pressure trend monitoring
symptoms.threshold: >10% drop from design flow or head

symptoms.description: Filter or screen blockage causing restricted flow
symptoms.description_fr: Blocage du filtre ou du tamis causant une restriction de débit
symptoms.primary_cbm: Differential pressure across filter/screen
symptoms.threshold: Differential pressure >2x clean element baseline

symptoms.description: Motor tripping on overcurrent or thermal protection
symptoms.description_fr: Déclenchement du moteur par surintensité ou protection thermique
symptoms.primary_cbm: Motor current signature analysis and relay event log review
symptoms.threshold: Any unplanned motor trip or current >115% FLA sustained

symptoms.description: Insulation resistance degradation in motor or cable
symptoms.description_fr: Dégradation de la résistance d’isolement du moteur ou du câble
symptoms.primary_cbm: Insulation resistance (megger) testing and polarization index
symptoms.threshold: <100 MOhm or PI <2.0

symptoms.description: Electrical arcing or short circuit detected
symptoms.description_fr: Arc électrique ou court-circuit détecté
symptoms.primary_cbm: Infrared thermography and partial discharge monitoring
symptoms.threshold: Any detected arc flash event or partial discharge >500 pC

symptoms.description: Visible corrosion, pitting, or material loss on surfaces
symptoms.description_fr: Corrosion visible, piqûres ou perte de matière sur les surfaces
symptoms.primary_cbm: Visual inspection and ultrasonic thickness measurement
symptoms.threshold: >20% wall thickness loss from nominal or active pitting >2 mm depth

symptoms.description: Visible cracks on structural member or rotating shaft
symptoms.description_fr: Fissures visibles sur un élément structural ou un arbre rotatif
symptoms.primary_cbm: Non-destructive testing (UT, MPI, DPI)
symptoms.threshold: Any detected crack >1 mm length or through-wall indication

symptoms.description: Wear debris or metal particles detected in oil sample
symptoms.description_fr: Débris d’usure ou particules métalliques détectés dans l’échantillon d’huile
symptoms.primary_cbm: Oil analysis (spectrometry, ferrography, particle count)
symptoms.threshold: Fe >100 ppm or Cu >50 ppm or ISO cleanliness >20/18/15

symptoms.description: Lubricant contamination with water or process fluid
symptoms.description_fr: Contamination du lubrifiant par eau ou fluide de procédé
symptoms.primary_cbm: Oil analysis (Karl Fischer moisture test)
symptoms.threshold: >500 ppm water in oil or visible emulsion

symptoms.description: Reduced equipment throughput or processing efficiency
symptoms.description_fr: Réduction du débit de l’équipement ou de l’efficacité de traitement
symptoms.primary_cbm: Process parameter trending (tonnage, recovery, power draw)
symptoms.threshold: >10% decline from design throughput or efficiency

symptoms.description: Sensor drift or inaccurate instrument reading
symptoms.description_fr: Dérive du capteur ou lecture d’instrument inexacte
symptoms.primary_cbm: Periodic calibration verification against reference standard
symptoms.threshold: >2% deviation from calibration reference

symptoms.description: Burning smell from motor, winding, or belt
symptoms.description_fr: Odeur de brûlé du moteur, des enroulements ou de la courroie
symptoms.primary_cbm: Infrared thermography and visual inspection
symptoms.threshold: Any detectable burning odor or visible smoke

symptoms.description: Chemical or acid smell near process equipment
symptoms.description_fr: Odeur chimique ou acide près de l’équipement de procédé
symptoms.primary_cbm: Gas detection monitoring and visual leak inspection
symptoms.threshold: Any detectable chemical odor outside containment zone

symptoms.description: Component seized or immobilised preventing rotation
symptoms.description_fr: Composant grippé ou immobilisé empêchant la rotation
symptoms.primary_cbm: Motor current spike analysis and manual rotation check
symptoms.threshold: Unable to rotate by hand or motor stall current detected

symptoms.description: Liner or wear part at minimum allowable thickness
symptoms.description_fr: Revêtement ou pièce d’usure à l’épaisseur minimale admissible
symptoms.primary_cbm: Ultrasonic thickness measurement during planned shutdown
symptoms.threshold: Remaining thickness <30% of original or at OEM replacement limit

symptoms.description: Belt conveyor tracking off-center or material spillage
symptoms.description_fr: Convoyeur à bande décentré ou déversement de matériau
symptoms.primary_cbm: Visual inspection and belt alignment sensor
symptoms.threshold: Belt edge >50 mm from centerline or any material spillage

symptoms.description: Gasket or seal expired or degraded beyond service life
symptoms.description_fr: Joint ou garniture expiré ou dégradé au-delà de la durée de vie
symptoms.primary_cbm: Time-based replacement per OEM schedule
symptoms.threshold: At or beyond OEM recommended replacement interval
